Endru Unnai Kandeno Lyrics Idhayamee Idhayame

Endru unnai kandeno penne
andre enthan uyirai thanthene(2)

kaalam nindraalum
kaatre nindraalum
un moochchil naanum
vaazhvene kanne.

thegam vittu
raththam ponaalum
en nenjai vittu
unpimbam pogaathu

vaazhum ninaivugale
ennai uyir vazha seiyyum
un kanneer thuliyil
en kaayangal aarum.

un thunbathil naanum
thunaiyaaven.
un kanneeril
naanum thuliyaaven.

jeevan ponaalum
yezhu jenmam ponaalum
un kannam thadavum
kadhal kaatraaven.

kadhal endrum
pookkal thaan ketkum.
kadhal endrum
raththam ketkaathu

kadalil vellam
theernthe ponaalum.
kadhal baanam
theernthe pogaathu.

kaayam nernthaalum
adi maranam neraathu.
un uravuchangili
uyirai kattuthadi

kannil undhan
kadhal ennangal
adhuthaan endhan
vaazhvin arthangal

en nenjai vittu
un ninaivum ponaale
en udalai vittu
uyirum poividume

thegam vittu
raththam ponaalum
en nenjai vittu
unpimbam pogaathu

un thunbathil naanum

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, highlighting the emotional turmoil of separation.

In which movie does this song appear?

The movie for this song is currently unknown.

Who are the singer and music director of this song?

The singer and music director details are currently unknown.

When was this song released?

This song was released on March 31, 1995.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Endru Unnai Kandeno beautifully encapsulates the emotions of love and longing. It conveys a sense of melancholy as the lyrics reflect on the pain of separation and the depth of affection. The soothing melody enhances the heartfelt message, making it a perfect choice for romantic moments. This timeless piece resonates with anyone who has experienced the complexities of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Endru Unnai Kandeno is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. The heartfelt lyrics and soothing composition create an emotional atmosphere that resonates deeply with listeners. This song is a timeless classic that beautifully expresses the pain and joy of love, making it a must-listen for any romantic occasion.
stanzaMeanings: Endru Unnai Kandeno Lyrics Idhayamee Idhayame
I have seen you, girl, and I have given my life to you.
Even if time passes or the wind blows, I will live in your breath, my dear.
Even if the blood flows out of my body, my heart will not let go of your love.
The memories that live will make my life survive, your tears are my lifeline.
In your sorrow, I will also be your support. In your tears, I will also be a drop.
Even if life is lost or if I have to take birth again, your eyes will always bring love to me.
Love will always bloom. Love will not let the blood flow.
Even if the waves in the sea go away, love's sky will never fade.
Even if the pain is endured, death will not come close. Your bond gives life to me.
Your love in my eyes is the meaning of my life.
If I lose my heart and your memory goes away, my body will also lose its life.
Even if the blood flows out of my body, my heart will not let go of your love.
The memories that live will make my life survive, your tears are my lifeline.
In your sorrow, I will also be your support. In your tears, I will also be a drop.
Even if life is lost or if I have to take birth again, your eyes will always bring love to me.
